input: Build me a habit tracker app. I want to define daily habits like 'drink water' or 'meditate', mark them complete each day, and see a streak counter. Should work on mobile.
An expense splitter for groups of friends on holiday. People can add expenses, mark who paid and who owes, and the app calculates who needs to pay whom at the end.
A pomodoro timer with an integrated task list. I add tasks, pick one to work on, run a 25-minute timer, take a 5-minute break. Track completed pomodoros per task.
A reading list app. I save books I want to read with title, author, cover image, and tags. I can mark them as 'reading', 'finished', or 'abandoned' and add a star rating and notes.
A workout logger for the gym. I create workout templates (e.g., 'Push Day' with bench press, overhead press, dips). When I work out, I log sets, reps, and weight. Show progress over time.
A meal planner where I plan meals for the week and it generates a shopping list based on the ingredients. I should be able to save favourite recipes and reuse them.
A simple journal app with mood tracking. Each day I write a journal entry and select my mood (1-5). Show me a calendar view with mood colours and let me search past entries.
A pet care reminder app. I add my pets and the things they need (feeding times, medication, vet appointments, walks). Get reminders and mark things done.
